name: Instant Veal Picatta
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the veal with salt and pepper.
2. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the veal and cook until tender, about 30 seconds per side. Transfer the veal to a platter and keep warm.
4. Add garlic to the skillet and sauté for 30 seconds.
5. Add wine and boil until the wine is reduced to glaze, about 2 minutes.
6. Stir in broth and capers. Simmer until the mixture is reduced to 1/4 cup, about 2 minutes.
7. Whisk in the remaining 1 tablespoon butter and pour the sauce over the veal.
